client_id.description: SendPulse API client ID (OAuth2 client-credentials). Never logged.

client_secret.description: SendPulse API client secret (OAuth2 client-credentials). Never logged.

base_url.description: SendPulse API base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: OAuth2 token endpoint override; defaults to <base_url>/oauth/access_token (legacy derives this from base_url at runtime, but the engine's default materialization is a fixed literal, not a base_url-derived one - see docs.md Known limits).
